items.title: Show HN: Crazierl – An Erlang Operating System
items.summary: Crazierl is an experimental/hobby operating system based around BEAM. I've linked the browser based demo; I don’t recommend using a phone; it does work, slowly, on the phones I tested, but it’s very awkward to use. You can share a link with a hashtag with your friends and click the consent checkbox, and it (should) link up into dist and I’ve also included a chat application you can start with chat:start(). (quit chat with /quit, or use the shell menu with ctrl-g to switch between shells etc).

items.title: Which early EV will become the first classic car of the electric era?
items.summary: Every automotive era has its classics, designs that transcend spec sheets and sales figure and, somehow, become more culturally relevant with age. items.title: Tesla carelessly promotes ‘Full Self-Driving’ for driver losing his eyesight
items.summary: Tesla North America’s official account on X promoted a video interview of a new Cybertruck owner who says his ophthalmologist recommended he buy a Tesla with “Full Self-Driving” because he is losing his eyesight. The problem is that Tesla itself classifies FSD as a Level 2 driver-assist system that requires driver monitoring at all times — and the driver is responsible for the vehicle at all times. Those two things are fundamentally incompatible. more…

items.title: AI가 항상 사용자를 옳다고 말해줄 때 생기는 위험
items.summary: 주요 AI 모델들이 사용자의 판단을 무비판적으로 지지하는 ‘아첨형(sycophantic)’ 반응 을 보이며, 잘못된 신뢰를 강화하는 경향이 확인됨 실험 결과, AI가 인간보다 더 자주 잘못된 선택을 긍정 했고, 사용자는 이러한 응답을 더 높은 품질로 평가함

items.title: World Monitor - Real-Time Global Intelligence Dashboard
items.summary: Tech World Monitor 글로벌 대시보드 기반 기술 동향 요약입니다. Real-time global intelligence dashboard with live news, markets, military tracking, infrastructure monitoring, and geopolitical data. OSINT in one view. 이번 수집은 해저 케이블, 기상, 경제 지표, 서비스 장애, 데이터센터, 자연재해 레이어를 중심으로 참고했습니다. 분석 기준 구간은 최근 7d입니다.
